description: OAuth client create envelope: a confirmation message, the save-the-secret warning, and the created client element carrying the one-time secret. The secret is returned to the user by design and is not output-redacted.

input.warning: IMPORTANT: The secret below is shown ONLY ONCE. Save it now - it cannot be retrieved later.

canonical.warning: IMPORTANT: The secret below is shown ONLY ONCE. Save it now - it cannot be retrieved later.
